name: io.github.bitcompare/mcp-server
description: Crypto yield data for AI agents: lending, savings, staking, borrowing & stablecoin rates. 18 tools.

environmentVariables.name: BITCOMPARE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer API key from https://pro.bitcompare.net/dashboard/keys. Format: ck_live_*. Requires a Pro or Enterprise plan for MCP access.

apiKey.description: Bearer API key from https://pro.bitcompare.net/dashboard/keys. Format: ck_live_*. Requires a Pro or Enterprise plan for MCP access.
